PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Duane Leonard, Esq. for Alexandra Castaner (Petitioner);
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

Mr. Leonard stated that they are asking for the administration of a will from Chile, that the beneficiary is 83 years old and resides in Chile, that the signature card is on file at a Bank of America in San Francisco, and that's the reason he opted to file in San Francisco. In addition, Mr. Leonard addressed the apostille, noting that the apostille did not have a copy of the will attached, that there will be a separate filing, that there is an "overlay" with regard to the will and the apostille, and that there is reference to the will being a numbered instrument. The Court commented that the apostille and will are to be attached. Brief discussions are held. The Court took the matter under submission and noted that it was not aware of any objection.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy R. Rosado. (Not Reported)
